description: BotLens pipeline latency and throughput dashboard. Assumes observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 stores raw per-occurrence measurements for latency histograms and count metrics.

panels.title: Telemetry Emitted

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'telemetry_emitted_total'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ;

panels.description: Total telemetry payloads emitted into the backend pipeline.

panels.title: Ingest Messages

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), COALESCE(NULLIF(m.labels ->> 'source_reason', ''), 'unknown') AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'ingest_messages_total'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Backend ingest throughput split by source classification.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_total'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ;

panels.title: DB Writes

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), COALESCE(NULLIF(m.labels ->> 'outcome', ''), 'unknown') AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'db_write_rows_total' AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Attempted BotLens persistence rows split by write outcome.

panels.title: Telemetry / Ingest Latency p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_transport_send_ms' THEN 'telemetry_transport_send_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_decode_ms' THEN 'ingest_decode_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_route_ms' THEN 'ingest_route_ms' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_wait_ms', 'telemetry_transport_send_ms', 'ingest_decode_ms', 'ingest_route_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Telemetry queue wait, transport send, ingest decode, and ingest route p95.

panels.title: Projector / Fanout / Viewer Latency p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'run_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'run_projector_apply_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_ms' THEN 'fanout_delivery_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_send_ms' THEN 'viewer_send_ms' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('symbol_projector_apply_ms', 'run_projector_apply_ms', 'fanout_delivery_ms', 'viewer_send_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Projector apply, fanout delivery, and viewer send p95.

panels.title: Snapshot / Persistence / DB Latency p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT $__timeGroup(m.observed_at, $__interval) AS time, CASE WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms' THEN 'persistence_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'db_initial_load_ms' THEN 'db_initial_load_ms' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('viewer_snapshot_load_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms', 'persistence_wait_ms', 'db_initial_load_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}'  AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroup(e.observed_at, $__interval) AS time, CONCAT('db_write_ms:', outcome.outcome, ':', COALESCE(NULLIF(e.details ->> 'payload_size_bucket', ''), 'small')) AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY COALESCE((e.details ->> 'write_ms')::double precision, 0.0))::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e CROSS JOIN LATERAL (VALUES   ('inserted', COALESCE((e.details ->> 'inserted_rows')::int, 0)),   ('duplicate', COALESCE((e.details ->> 'duplicate_rows')::int, 0)),   ('updated', COALESCE((e.details ->> 'updated_rows')::int, 0)),   ('noop', COALESCE((e.details ->> 'noop_rows')::int, 0)),   ('failed', COALESCE((e.details ->> 'failed_rows')::int, 0)) ) AS outcome(outcome, row_count) WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.event_name = 'db_write_observed' AND outcome.row_count > 0  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}'  AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2) q ORDER BY time;

panels.description: Snapshot and persistence latency, with DB write p95 split by outcome and payload bucket.

panels.title: Latest Worst Latency Stages

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_transport_send_ms' THEN 'telemetry_transport_send_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_decode_ms' THEN 'ingest_decode_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_route_ms' THEN 'ingest_route_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'run_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'run_projector_apply_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_ms' THEN 'fanout_delivery_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_send_ms' THEN 'viewer_send_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms' THEN 'persistence_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_ms' THEN 'db_write_ms' WHEN metric_name = 'db_initial_load_ms' THEN 'db_initial_load_ms' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, ROUND((percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_wait_ms', 'telemetry_transport_send_ms', 'ingest_decode_ms', 'ingest_route_ms', 'symbol_projector_apply_ms', 'run_projector_apply_ms', 'fanout_delivery_ms', 'viewer_send_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms', 'persistence_wait_ms', 'db_write_ms', 'db_initial_load_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Selected-window p95 latency ranking across the full pipeline.

panels.title: Upstream Throughput

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_emitted_total' THEN 'telemetry_emitted' WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_transport_send_total' THEN 'telemetry_sent' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_messages_total' THEN 'ingest_messages' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_enqueued_total' THEN 'symbol_fact_enqueues' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_enqueued_total' THEN 'run_lifecycle_enqueues' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_enqueued_total' THEN 'run_notification_enqueues' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_emitted_total', 'telemetry_transport_send_total', 'ingest_messages_total', 'symbol_fact_enqueued_total', 'run_lifecycle_enqueued_total', 'run_notification_enqueued_total')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Telemetry, ingest, and queue enqueue counts over time.

panels.title: Fanout / Viewer / DB Throughput

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE   WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_enqueued_total' THEN 'fanout_enqueues'   WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_items_total' THEN 'fanout_deliveries'   WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_send_total' THEN 'viewer_sends'   WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_attempted_rows_total' THEN 'db_rows_attempted'   WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_rows_total' THEN CONCAT('db_rows_', COALESCE(NULLIF(m.labels ->> 'outcome', ''), 'unknown'))   ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at)  AND m.metric_name IN ('fanout_enqueued_total', 'fanout_delivery_items_total', 'viewer_send_total', 'db_write_attempted_rows_total', 'db_write_rows_total')  AND (m.metric_name <> 'db_write_rows_total' OR COALESCE(m.labels ->> 'outcome', '') IN ('inserted', 'duplicate'))  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}'  AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Fanout and viewer throughput with attempted, inserted, and duplicate DB-row overlays.

panels.title: Pipeline Stage Totals

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_emitted_total' THEN 'telemetry_emitted' WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_transport_send_total' THEN 'telemetry_sent' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_messages_total' THEN CONCAT('ingest_', COALESCE(NULLIF(m.labels ->> 'source_reason', ''), 'unknown')) WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_enqueued_total' THEN 'symbol_fact_enqueues' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_enqueued_total' THEN 'run_lifecycle_enqueues' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_enqueued_total' THEN 'run_notification_enqueues' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_enqueued_total' THEN 'fanout_enqueues' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_items_total' THEN 'fanout_deliveries' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_send_total' THEN 'viewer_sends' WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_attempted_rows_total' THEN 'db_rows_attempted' WHEN metric_name = 'db_write_rows_total' THEN CONCAT('db_rows_', COALESCE(NULLIF(m.labels ->> 'outcome', ''), 'unknown')) ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, ROUND(sum(m.value)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS total, ROUND(avg(m.value)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS avg_sample_value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at)  AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_emitted_total', 'telemetry_transport_send_total', 'ingest_messages_total', 'symbol_fact_enqueued_total', 'run_lifecycle_enqueued_total', 'run_notification_enqueued_total', 'fanout_enqueued_total', 'fanout_delivery_items_total', 'viewer_send_total', 'db_write_attempted_rows_total', 'db_write_rows_total')  AND (m.metric_name <> 'db_write_rows_total' OR COALESCE(m.labels ->> 'outcome', '') IN ('inserted', 'duplicate', 'updated', 'noop', 'failed'))  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}'  AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}')  AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC;

panels.description: Pipeline totals with DB attempted/inserted/duplicate/noop/failed row breakouts.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;

list.name: series_key
list.label: Series
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __value, payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE event_type LIKE 'botlens_domain.%' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __value, payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key' AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_events WHERE event_type LIKE 'botlens_domain.%' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '' AND COALESCE(payload -> 'context' ->> 'series_key', '') <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: component
list.label: Component
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: queue_name
list.label: Queue
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: storage_target
list.label: Storage
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: failure_mode
list.label: Failure
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: Pipeline Latency & Throughput
